calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymond Fong, of Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415. 551.9524, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearances.

RULING: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is denied. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Pamela Pecora-Hansen, Esq., Asst. District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9524, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Petitioner's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no appearance by respondent, or objection by counsel, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is Granted, for the reasons set forth in Petitioner People of the State of California's motion, which is unopposed. Claimant Phillip K. Griffin is ordered to serve complete verified responses, without objection, and to produce documents to Petitioner's Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents (Set One), Form Interrogatories (Set One), and Special Interrogatories (Set One) within fifteen (15) days of the date of notice of the written Order on this motion. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
